title: pellaea zygophylla
intro: Pellaea zygophylla, also known as the alpine button fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pellaea zygophylla are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Pellaea zygophylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
